briefdescription.para: Macro for extracting relative pin number from the absolute pin number.
Macro for extracting port number from the absolute pin number.
Macro for extracting absolute pin number from the relative pin and port numbers.
Macro for statically checking errata susceptibility. It determines if the fix should be compiled in (and later dynamically checked) or not.

Macro for dynamically checking errata susceptibility. In addition to checking compilation-time defines, it reads the chip's hardware revision at runtime to determine if this specific version is affected or not.

simplesect.para: This macro does a static check first, if false, it statically evaluates to false. Only when static check evaluates to true, a dynamic check call is made.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking if an object is accesible by EasyDMA of given peripheral instance.

detaileddescription.para: Peripherals that use EasyDMA require buffers to be placed in certain memory regions.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to an object whose location is to be checked.
The pointed object is located in the memory region accessible by EasyDMA.
The pointed object is not located in the memory region accessible by EasyDMA.
